testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return message from Error object
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return message from Error object

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return default message for null
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return default message for null

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return default message for undefined
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return default message for undefined

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return trimmed string
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return trimmed string

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return default message for empty string
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return default message for empty string

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should convert number to string
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should convert number to string

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should convert boolean to string
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should convert boolean to string

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should extract msg property from object
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should extract msg property from object

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should extract message property from object
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should extract message property from object

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should prefer msg over message
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should prefer msg over message

testcase.classname: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return default for object without msg or message
testcase.name: alerting-utils normalizeMessage should return default for object without msg or message

testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should redact sensitive keys

testcase.classname: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should redact api_key
testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should redact api_key

testcase.classname: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should redact null when key is sensitive
testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should redact null when key is sensitive

testcase.classname: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should redact undefined when key is sensitive
testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should redact undefined when key is sensitive

testcase.classname: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should return undefined for null with non-sensitive key
testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should return undefined for null with non-sensitive key

testcase.classname: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should return undefined for undefined with non-sensitive key
testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should return undefined for undefined with non-sensitive key

testcase.classname: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should preserve primitives
testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should preserve primitives

testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should preserve strings under max length

testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should sanitize object properties

testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should handle circular references

testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should sanitize array elements

testcase.classname: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should return object with redacted sensitive properties
testcase.name: alerting-utils sanitizeValue should return object with redacted sensitive properties

testcase.classname: alerting-utils dataProcessingAlert should throw when process name is missing

testcase.classname: alerting-utils dataProcessingAlert should publish alert with process name
testcase.name: alerting-utils dataProcessingAlert should publish alert with process name

testcase.classname: alerting-utils dataProcessingAlert should use provided type
testcase.name: alerting-utils dataProcessingAlert should use provided type

testcase.classname: alerting-utils dataProcessingAlert should not throw on publish error when throwOnPublishError is false
testcase.name: alerting-utils dataProcessingAlert should not throw on publish error when throwOnPublishError is false

testcase.classname: alerting-utils dataProcessingAlert should throw on publish error when throwOnPublishError is true
testcase.name: alerting-utils dataProcessingAlert should throw on publish error when throwOnPublishError is true
